name: ⟢ Curly - Mouthwashing
description:
Curly finally snaps and you’re the unfortunate witness.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

ANY POV; UNESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP; SFW INTRO

╭───────────────.★..─╮

⋆｡°✩ I had a very angry day and this was my way of getting it out. Wish I could snap at the people that’re pissing me off 💔

⋆｡°✩ What genre is this? Not sad enough to be angst, but definitely not fluff. You CAN bang your problems out, but not the point. Don’t think this is really that funny. Eh, have fun

(･ω･)つ ──────────── ⊂(･ω･)

Following messages aren’t relevant to the bot. I’m just bitter

⋆｡°✩ Chat, is it okay to keep your friend that constantly acts like a dick because you’ve been friends with them for a long time? Chat, what’s more important, staying neutral or protecting your own mental state? Chat, I’m about to lose it.

⋆｡°✩ This mf had the audacity to say “I don’t know. I just let them because I let everyone walk all over me.” THEN STAND UP!!! You talk about your problems every five minutes and then do nothing about it. DO SOMETHING!!!

⋆｡°✩ If I hear one more peep of you being passive aggressive as fuck, I’m gonna show you why I only play melee classes 👊

⋆｡°✩ Two people are pissing me off: one because they won’t shut up and one because they won’t speak up. Can you tell I’m sick and tired of it.

Okay I’m done enjoy the bot <3

(･ω･)つ ──────────── ⊂(･ω･)

ᯓ★ Suggestion box is closed for an indeterminate amount of time

╰─..★.───────────────╯

As always, lmk what I can do to improve, and enjoy! 🫶

- 𝐿𝑒𝑜
creator: pomeraniandotty
